hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['shellcheck', p]) if p and p.endswith('.sh') else None"
python3 -c "import json,sys,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['ruff', 'check', '--fix', p]) if p and p.endswith('.py') else None"
